name: Free Fire India Championship 2025 — Season 1
description: The most anticipated FFIC season yet, with a record ₹1.5 Crore prize pool and 36 team slots. The format includes an expanded league stage, new playoff bracket system, and offline grand finals.

name: FFIC Showdown Qualifier — North India
description: Open qualifier tournament for North Indian teams to secure a spot in the FFIC 2025 showdown. All skill levels welcome.

name: FFIC Winter Championship 2025
description: End-of-year championship to crown the winter season champion. Features 20 invited teams and a ₹40L prize pool.

name: Community Creator Invitational 2025
description: A hybrid tournament featuring top competitive teams and popular content creators in a unique exhibition format. Exact details to be announced.
